race.comment: WILLIE OR WONG HE (5) has switched from Chris Waller's Sydney stable on a three-week return. Over-raced in the blinkers when well supported over 1900m at Hawkesbury last time, and they come straight off. His Rosehill and Canterbury form prior reads well, and he maps to get every chance. Finds a nice race and can get the job done. LITTLE LUNCH (9) was much better on the turf here over 1800m at her second start for the new yard. Went well at Gosford three back and is a chance on a quick back up. COOLOUNDRA (4) peaks for the Vandyke yard and comes back 300m. Needs to find more, but that's entirely possible racing on poly for the first time. COME ON MR SNIPS (3) was wide and didn't finish it off over a mile at Beaudesert. Was tracking well prior and consider.
